public static Task<IMetaTable> GetParentTableAsync(
	this MetaTableRelationData fkRelation,
	IMetaData metaData,
	CancellationToken ct = null
)

Parameters

Type: QBM.CompositionApi.DtoMetaTableRelationData
metaData
Type: IMetaData

Type: System.ThreadingCancellationToken

Return Value

Type: TaskIMetaTable

Usage Note

In Visual Basic and C#, you can call this method as an instance method on any object of type MetaTableRelationData. When you use instance method syntax to call this method, omit the first parameter. For more information, see Extension Methods (Visual Basic) or Extension Methods (C# Programming Guide).
